page_metadata.biotools__summary: Bio2Rxn is as a web-based tool to provide putative enzymatic reaction predictions for uncharacterized protein sequences. Bio2Rxn adopts a consensus strategy by incorporating six types of enzyme prediction tools.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Bio2Rxn is as a web-based tool to provide putative enzymatic reaction predictions for uncharacterized protein sequences. Bio2Rxn adopts a consensus strategy by incorporating six types of enzyme prediction tools.
